name: langfuse
description: Emits Langfuse generation traces for every LLM completion. Records prompt, response, model, usage, latency, and error details to Langfuse cloud or self-hosted.
author: chirag127

host.description: Langfuse host (cloud.langfuse.com, us.cloud.langfuse.com, or self-hosted URL)

enabled.description: Emit traces when true; act as a no-op when false

sampleRate.description: Fraction of requests to trace (1.0 = all, 0.1 = 10%)

flushAt.description: Number of events to buffer before flushing to Langfuse

flushInterval.description: Max ms between flushes (in-flight events flushed on timer)

redactBody.description: Redact prompt + completion bodies from traces (metadata still recorded)
